name: Large Rectangle Kids' Storage Striped Bin - Pillowfort™
description: Keep their space neat and organized with the Striped Large Rectangle Storage Bin from Pillowfort™. Featuring a lidded design to keep the contents safe, this kids storage bin features two handles at the sides for easy carrying. Designed in a rectangular silhouette, this large storage bin offers space to keep anything from blankets, pillows, sheets and linen to books, craft supplies, board games and much more. Adorned with a striped pattern, it brings a sweet complement to their room decor.
